reviews.text: Very friendly and accommodating office. Michael and Amanda are both passionate about their work and both are incredibly knowledgeable.   I'd recommend this office to all my friends.

reviews.name: places/ChIJ4_esVcd7ZIgR5RVzuSlDQi4/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2tOQlkyWjVkR3BPVTJKS2VIRXhVakl4Ym0xTGVFRRAB
reviews.text:
Unfortunately I cannot recommend Genesis Lifestyle Medicine. I went in to get my hormones tested because I was feeling off and extremely fatigued, gaining weight despite being very active in the gym, walking 20k steps a day and eating a strict diet. I had weird vibes on my first visit. I was told that I should be eating 950 calories a day and Amanda continued to tell me how she lives off of 750 calories and “feels great!” Right then and there I should have just walked out. Anyways, they drew my blood, I waited a week for my results and Michael called me when they came in and told me my testosterone was low and he recommended I come in that day to get a testosterone shot. So I did and before I go any further, I’m Type 1 Diabetic. I told them this on my very first visit, so I had no idea if testosterone was going to affect my blood sugar levels or anything like that. I was not told it would either. A few hours after the injection, my blood sugar skyrocketed and remained high for several days after. I decided I was not going to go back after that.

Fast forward to this past Monday and I saw a new endocrinologist who has specialized in hormones for the past 12 years. I told her my experience with Genesis and when I told her that they gave me a testosterone shot and wanted me to take weekly injections, her eyes about popped out of her head. She told me my testosterone is completely fine and would have never recommended I do that. She also strongly disagreed with me eating under 1000 calories a day especially since I’m trying to gain muscle.

The sad part is these kind of places are not regulated. These are not doctors and they should not be doing what they are doing. He was starting me on testosterone when I didn’t need to be and could have severely messed up my hormones even more. The fact that I was not warned it would increase my blood sugar is a big red flag. Because they have no idea what they are doing and if they went to actual school for this, then they would have been able to warn me. PLEASE do not go to this place. Please see an actual doctor who went to medical school. Who actually knows what they are doing and doesn’t encourage you to starve yourself to lose weight.

reviews.name: places/ChIJ_-OS2OR7ZIgRE3PRwDOYTGw/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2kweGJsTnJTalptTFcxbWQzcFliMHRKY2pJMWFuYxAB
reviews.text:
These people are the best and the treatments are amazing. I had a stem cell infusion and my asthma cleared up I’d say about 80%. My knees which were a real problem are not a problem anymore, my mental state is generally much better (those stem cells must’ve done some work on some old head injuries I had), and the most surprising part was when I accidentally ate a nut, something I’d been very allergic to my whole life, and nothing happened. I’m not allergic to some nuts anymore. And even the ones that I’m still allergic to—the reaction is barely there. There are more good things to come too.
If you can do this—DO THIS!

reviews.name: places/ChIJ_-OS2OR7ZIgRE3PRwDOYTGw/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTUNvN1lDS1F3EAE
reviews.text:
I went here the first time on a Groupon for Botox. Botox had stopped working for me years ago, so I just gave up. But with the special I figured, what the hell, if it doesn’t work, I’m out 100 bucks. But if it does, then I’ll come back. I asked if they did PDO threads, they did. So I made an appointment to get those done as they were having a special.

Let me start by saying that Samantha who works the front desk is freaking awesome. An amazing spirit, beautiful, kind, and caring. This is not a business that focuses solely on financial gain. They truly care about everyone that walks through the door. Holly did my first round of Botox and the PDO threads. I saw results with the Botox pretty quickly, but it didn’t last, and the PDO threads didn’t take. They may have broken off, which they can do, but after I sent photos to Sammi, I was told to come back in, which I did. I was calculating how much more I was going to have to pay when Holly told me, “there’s no charge for this today”. I almost cried. I’m 69 years old, extremely vain, don’t do a hell of a whole lot cosmetic wise on my skin, at least not like I used to, so hearing those words almost brought me to tears. I’m actually a little teary eyed as I’m writing this, because when people are kind, it melts my heart.
I love how my face looks. The jowls have tightened up without giving me a “Joan Rivers“ image.
I would be remiss if I didn’t mention another injector who did another round of Botox for me, unfortunately, I cannot remember her name. I think at this point my skin just absorbs the Botox, I hear that can happen sometimes. But it did work enough for me to notice.
I drive from Murfreesboro to Brentwood, it’s worth every mile and every minute.
My new favorite place, I love these girls!

reviews.name: places/ChIJ_cQmoiRjYIgRemnrTH659lA/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2xkdVV6YzRNRkozYzNvd1N6STRkbFkzYm1SMVpFRRAB
reviews.text: I’ve benefitted fairly well from the books ("The Way Out" by Gordon and "Unlearn Your Pain" by Schubiner) so far. And I’ve  been making definite progress with my symptoms and my reactions to my symptoms after seven years of chronic pain in multiple places (hands, shoulder, throat, and on-and-off with my back, neck, knees, and elbows). I saw Dr. McClanahan and he really helped me go deep and think about where my pain was coming from and ways that I’ve been suppressing negative emotions in order to be approved of by others. This sort of suppression can contribute to chronic pain. My pain has been decreasing, and I’ve been WAY less bothered by the pain each day.

reviews.name: places/ChIJ_cQmoiRjYIgRemnrTH659lA/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURuMHNxbTlnRRAB
reviews.text: Highly, highly recommend Dr. McClanahan for people suffering from chronic pain. My wife has dealt with severe, unexplainable pain for the last year and we had begun to lose hope through various other doctors/physicians/treatment plans. We had seen neurologists, orthopedics, chiropractic care, and everything in between. It was truly a blessing when we finally found Dr. McClanahan. He listens empathetically and seeks to understand all facets of one's experiences before diving into any sort of diagnosis. He has an expert level understanding of how the mind and body relate to one another in regards to our experiences and pain. He is honest, thorogh, and genuinely cares for his patients. The impact his treatment has had on my wife and our family cannot be stated highly enough....we had been through the ringer for the last year and had begun to lose hope that we wouldn't be able to find resolution to what she was experiencing. Then we found Dr. McClanahan and everything drastically changed. He's the best doctor we've ever worked with, by far, and I absolutely encourage people dealing with chronic pain to check his practice out. Can't recommend enough!

reviews.name: places/ChIJ_cQmoiRjYIgRemnrTH659lA/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURkNmVuRnZRRRAB
reviews.text: I started seeing Dr. McClanahan for trauma and related physical manifestations of a trauma related disorder. I had tried a multitude of medications, therapies, and alternative treatments before seeing him, but really saw the most growth in my year of working with him. He is a genuinely kind and caring provider who seeks to find the root causes of your symptoms and help you take initiative in the process of healing. He takes his time with each session, listening to your process and offering insights/resources along the way. After years of living in numb/shut-down states, through my work with Dr. McClanahan I became a human for the first time: a person who can experience joy and sadness, gratitude and anger, pain and relief. I've learned how to draw boundaries, have opinions, and stand up for myself without living in chronic guilt and shame. I've learned how to listen to and cope with symptoms when they come, while not letting them rule my life anymore. I would highly recommend him to anyone experiencing chronic physiological or psychological symptoms. He is an amazing resource and such an asset to have in Chattanooga.

reviews.name: places/ChIJ_cQmoiRjYIgRemnrTH659lA/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTURBZ0xTbVVnEAE
reviews.text: Dr. Matt helped me so much. He is a wealth of knowledge and resources. He is very passionate about helping people with chronic pain and other symptoms. He is the only provider I have seen that has truly understood how to help me. I will forever be grateful for everything I have learned from him. If you are struggling with chronic pain or other chronic symptoms, definitely reach out to him.

reviews.name: places/ChIJ_cQmoiRjYIgRemnrTH659lA/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR5M0thZTFnRRAB
reviews.text: A friend recommended Dr. McClanahan when my partner was in the midst of a health crisis and no other doctors had been able to help. Dr. McClanahan went above and beyond, offering unwavering support and compassion, coming up with creative solutions, arranging flexible payment options, and even making house calls when necessary. The treatment was successful and my partner is now thriving. If you have a long list of doctors who haven't been able to help you, I highly recommend calling Dr. McClanahan. He is caring, talented, and will do everything he can to help you or connect you with someone who can.

reviews.text: The ladies at Game Day were great. I went in, did a blood test and then talked about the best treatment for me. I now have the treatment I need. All in less then a hour.

reviews.name: places/ChIJl2ZKM_1lYIgRU_pf6e-AEVc/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2pOSFlVaDVZV05IVjJwVVlXSmtPUzFZZFc1NlMyYxAB
reviews.text: I would leave them negative stars if I could, If you’re looking for testosterone treatment, I would look elsewhere some of the problems that I had with them is yes I had low Testosterone on my first appointment, they drew blood and told me what it was suggested Testosterone treatment after a few weeks went back for a blood test had come up but not what was that so they bump me to 7 mL per week. Call my prescription back in sent to me prescription bottle still says five go back pretty much every 90 days which you To schedule because if you don’t, you’ll have to go to their office to get your shot and blood work again before they will call it back in again After being there for a year, My testosterone never really got above 350 and I’m really not sure that because you have to call them to find out what your testosterone level is after they take your blood. And the worst part about all of it For the last three months that I was there, they wanted me to come in to get my shot because I realized I had not given blood to find out what my levels were so I gave blood got my level And they still will not call in my prescription because my contract would run out before my 90 day supply, What they wanted me to do was to renew again put it on my affirm account so it continue shipping me my testosterone. I still owe a little over $3000 on a treatment plan that never got me above 350. You see the doctor one time that’s when you go in there the first time you will have to be the one who calls them to remind them that it’s time for your medicine. You will have to be the one who will have to remember. It is time to have your blood drawn and you will have to be the one to remember that they bumped your dosage up and remind them of that I went back to my family doctor and within 90 days he has my levels above 600 he has me scheduled every six weeks to have blood drawn and see what my levels are at the best of all it is almost all covered by my insurance and even if it was not $120 for the visit $90 for the blood draw and $22 for the testosterone so I after wasting a year with a Chattanooga men’s clinic I will not be returning. Please do yourself a favor. Look at options for not only testosterone treatment but also ED treatment talk to your family doctor. There’s very little that these people offer that you cannot get from your family doctor At a much more affordable option

reviews.name: places/ChIJb3kJVpFjYIgRMzneYyDtQzU/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT25selZFWjFZVTVrUTFsdU4wSkZabUZRZGxOSE1rRRAB
reviews.text:
Being told I had thyroid cancer was devastating. I’ve always cared deeply about my health, so the diagnosis was a shock and it pushed me to find every possible answer about what went wrong and how to truly restore my health.

Finding Dr. Rebecca was the turning point. She didn’t just focus on my lab numbers; she looked at me as a whole person. Through comprehensive testing, she uncovered mold exposure, low bile production, important genetic insights, and hidden gut imbalances that were quietly working against my health. She then designed a plan to support detoxification, improve digestion, and help my thyroid hormones work as effectively as possible.

Even though my journey isn’t complete, I’ve already seen meaningful progress. My thermography scans show improvement, my energy has returned, and for the first time since my thyroid issues began, I feel confident that I’m on the right path.

I am profoundly grateful to have found Dr. Rebecca. She has truly walked alongside me through this process. She is compassionate, thorough, and completely committed to my healing. I know she will stay with me until my healing journey is complete. Working with her has given me both answers and hope - and truly changed my life. If you are looking for someone who will go beyond surface-level solutions and be a true partner in your health, I wholeheartedly recommend Dr. Rebecca.

reviews.name: places/ChIJb3kJVpFjYIgRMzneYyDtQzU/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT25sSlEyMVhPR1p6TmxZelJWWnRXREpuV2kxemVYYxAB
reviews.text: Dr Rebecca is so knowledgeable and caring! The time and energy she puts into her care is unmatched, and she’s not afraid to keep digging until she gets to the cause of the problem! I know she’s helped me in my health, and it would be worth it for you to see if she can help you too!

reviews.name: places/ChIJb3kJVpFjYIgRMzneYyDtQzU/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJX0MtWTdzbmQ2S2tnRRAB
reviews.text:
Edited: Hope you find this - Dr Rebecca Warren has done work to bury it. She says she is “saddened” & “shocked” by my review, but I wrote it to benefit YOU reading it.  I hope it can save someone a lot of time, money and frustration!

Follow your gut - if you are doing everything as instructed, not getting expected results, and feeling worse, get a different perspective.  Stay strong and know that sometimes your very best effort is whatever you can give.  I thought I was not doing enough & felt a lot of despair thinking I wasn’t doing enough when, in reality, I was very sick.

I had hoped that maybe my review would have elicited some introspection for Dr. Rebecca Warren’s practice, that is obviously not the case from her response. If she had a suspicion that something "deeper" was going on, that in itself should have been an indicator to dig deeper (peel that layer) not add more time to continue the same approach.

Beware that Dr. R Warren may miss diagnosing serious underlying and contributing health conditions. She may hit the mark with many but greatly miss the mark with others like me.  If you feel you MAY even possibly have any significant medical conditions, try to find yourself a MEDICAL DOCTOR who is certified in FUNCTIONAL AND INTEGRATIVE MEDICINE* so that your whole health is assessed and addressed!

I spent over $5k to work with Dr. R Warren from Dec '23 through Aug '24 due to a diagnosis of Hashimoto's and not making progress in reducing TPO (thyroid peroxidase antibody levels) with a previous naturopathic approach.  Her impression after looking at my case and bloodwork was that my thyroid wasn’t the problem and that it was “my gut.”  I was assured that through reducing stress, following an anti-inflammatory diet, ketogenesis, and establishing and “nourishing” my body with the right minerals and nutrients, I would make significant progress.  While working directly with the Dr., I had unresolved severe fatigue and joint pain and at multiple times complained that I was having difficulty having the energy to keep up with the recommended supplements and diet, etc.  Despite this, I was diligent and dedicated to follow all recommendations.  I just continued to feel very off and sick, so much so that I decided to sell my business thinking that the accompanying stress was a major cause of my problems and a reason for not feeling better.  During this same time, Dr. Warren shared that her office was struggling with personnel and at one point she felt it was justified to extend our agreed treatment period for that reason.  Appointments were canceled, she would arrive on Zoom while nursing her child, and more than once had to shorten the meeting or reschedule due to childcare falling through.  I also felt frustrated because I was getting the impression that somehow I wasn’t working hard enough to make significant gains, esp when I couldn't get into ketosis.  When lab work was done again at the end of the consultation period, I was anxious to see at least some progress with my TPO.  I was greatly disappointed that not only did I not make progress; in fact, my TPO had GREATLY INCREASED!  At our last meeting, we decided I needed a break to re-assess and decide next steps.  After some prayer and thought, I decided to go in a different direction.

Fast forward to now, about 12 months later... for the last 10 months, I have been working with Dr. Ellen Antoine, who is a DO who specializes in autoimmune conditions.  She 100% believes in a holistic approach, recommends all the great naturopathic and supplemental modalities, but she uses her medical degree to fully diagnose and treat!   Because I was so sick, she gave me options for treatment that included either or both pharmaceuticals and herbs.  My labwork showed I had the MTHFR mutation, relapsing Epstein-Barr Virus along with 4 current (IgM) tick-borne (Lyme, Tick-borne Relapsing Fever (TBRF), Babesia, Ehrlichia, and Bartonella) infections! No wonder I was so sick and not getting better!  I'm thrilled to report that I am finally feeling 100% back to normal!

reviews.text: The Tier 1 staff is so kind and their communication with patients is quick. I never have to wait for emails or forms to arrive. Dr Nichols is extremely knowledgeable and takes time with his patients answering questions.  The patient portal is easy to use and Dr Nichols responds the same day on the portal to any issues.

reviews.name: places/ChIJ6_F9VgUiZ4gRf7Jn1CokiCw/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT21wMGRHVjJkRFZFYzFSdVlsSmFVbmxGTjE5MVFXYxAB
reviews.text: Dr Nichols and Angie are leaders in their field.  They have vast knowledge of HRT and are so easy to talk with.  My wife Kathy and I have been patients since 2018, and they have changed our lives.  Unlike the many testosterone  and HRT mills out there, they treat symptoms and not numbers and we couldn't be happier with the results!

reviews.name: places/ChIJ6_F9VgUiZ4gRf7Jn1CokiCw/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2xwUmJuSlJNbE10VWxkelNrZENjbkJVYnpGUlFtYxAB
reviews.text: This doctor has changed my life. My GP suggested that I take SSRI's to deal with my constant lack of energy and all day, every day exhaustion. I was tired all the time and needed days to recover from my workouts. After 4 years of grinding through life like this I was somehow lucky enough to find Dr. Nichols. His treatment, knowledge, and first hand experience has given me my life back. I cannot recommend Tier 1 and specifically Dr. Nichols enough. He understands what effect hormone imbalance has on a man's life and will help you get back to yourself.

reviews.name: places/ChIJ6_F9VgUiZ4gRf7Jn1CokiCw/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2xSNmFHVlhRVk4yUVRWRVVVTnFNVEpWV2pKRlNtYxAB
reviews.text: I am so grateful for Dr. Nichols and his entire team. His expertise and direct honest and clear approach is second to none. A special thank you to Hannah in his office. She was a true angel in making all the arrangements and onboarding of the process. Outstanding customer service and expertise which I wish I knew about 10 years ago. Truly grateful!

reviews.name: places/ChIJ6_F9VgUiZ4gRf7Jn1CokiCw/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTUNRbWRYY0t3EAE
reviews.text: I just completed a year of working with Dr. Nichols and his team at Tier 1 Health and Wellness, and I couldn’t be more thrilled with the results.  Under his expert guidance, my energy levels, fitness, sleep quality, and overall well-being have improved dramatically.  Dr, Nichols and his staff are not only highly knowledgeable and professional but also genuinely invested in their patients’ health.  Their personalized approach and compassionate care have made all the difference.  I highly recommend Tier 1 Health and Wellness to anyone looking to take their health to the next level.

reviews.text: Dr Fryer and his team are awesome! Most of the doctors I have seen in the past run a factorized treatment system, one size fits all, which can be very frustrating when you feel like your specific needs aren’t being attended to. At Dr Fryers office, he will work with you to create a health game plan for you specifically. After about 5 to 6 months I can personally tell you I feel like a completely different person. I highly recommend them for anyone truly looking to make a change!!!

reviews.text: Dr. Gregory Fryer been my physician for over 14 yrs.  He strive to create a comfortable and trusting place. He shows genuine concern for my well being and seeks to get to the bottom on my physical systems. He listen and explain in a tone, language I am able to understand.  The doctor is welcoming, spiritual and that's very important to me. My heavenly father is there. The staff is amazing . Im thankful 🙏.

reviews.name: places/ChIJKdtonbHYZIgRylI6eCa-Gwg/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2pjeWVGQkRjbGc0WkdwWGVGUm9TbGxVVlRoMmVWRRAB
reviews.text: A new beginning! reviews.text:
I had an amazing experience at Optimize U. The entire staff was welcoming, professional, and truly made me feel heard from the moment I walked in.

The P.A. took the time to explain everything clearly and answered all of my questions without rushing me. I felt comfortable, supported, and confident in the plan moving forward.

Brian was absolutely amazing — knowledgeable, attentive, and genuinely caring. You can tell he truly wants his patients to feel their best. That level of personal attention makes all the difference.

Highly recommend Optimize U if you’re looking for a team that actually listens and prioritizes your health and goals.

reviews.name: places/ChIJF7pkF9cnZYgRuPF2l5iXlQA/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2xKUWJrODRWRXBZVkhSS1ZETkxWbVJOV2tzellrRRAB
reviews.text:
Edited: I got a call from Kim today to ask some questions and I’m so glad she did. Apparently they do offer the patch now and I found out that the progesterone I’ve been getting isn’t the optimum, so I have raised my review to 4 stars because someone should have gone over all this with me at my previous refill. The communication and patient tracking definitely needs improvement.

This place is just ok. They seem to cater to male steroid injections, so beware, you will not get the menopausal support you need here. My reg doc is an NP (so not a doc) so she sent me here when peri started. Everyone here is nice enough, that’s not the problem. However they only prescribe estradiol in capsule form. That’s been working ok for me so I’ve stuck with this place for the past year. Now, I do need more estradiol, but the capsules cause spikes that cause insomnia and I really need a patch for smooth, consistent absorption. They will not prescribe any patches. That’s the red flag that this place is really just for men. So now I guess I need to find another doctor or begin the process with an online meno specialist who can prescribe me a patch.

reviews.name: places/ChIJF7pkF9cnZYgRuPF2l5iXlQA/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2w5S1l6VlhjRXh0WjJaTVFsSXpiMEZNYXpoSGVWRRAB
reviews.text: I went to Optimize U as a recommendation from another client of theirs that I could see results.  I got my blood work, they prescribed me some help and I am down 65 pounds and feel better than I have in 15+ years.   Kim was amazing and very helpful, she has a great attitude and I can tell she really wants to help.  I need to go back for fresh bloodwork and check numbers soon and adjust medication if needed.  I was low T and got a glp1 and the results are better than expected and it’s only been 5 months.  I feel like I got my life back and I am only 1/2 way to my goal… I can’t wait to feel what I will be like at the 1 year mark!!   Thank you Optimize U.

reviews.name: places/ChIJF7pkF9cnZYgRuPF2l5iXlQA/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT21vMGJrOUxaMDFRVjB0V1ptMXJUVjlQYkdRM1QxRRAB
reviews.text: I’ve never had a less than stellar experience with everyone at the OptimizeU team. All of my interactions have been incredibly helpful and positive. Thankful for all of those who work there and put the patients health first. Thank you

reviews.name: places/ChIJF7pkF9cnZYgRuPF2l5iXlQA/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN4bThiNkhBEAE
reviews.text: Was feeling off and after doing some research decided to get my levels tested. After the results came back the Dr. Took time to explain everything in my blood work. Better than any other Dr. Or clinic anywhere else. They do not pressure you into anything and even let you keep you lab panels Incase you wanted to go to you PC. Now I’m feeling way better and energy levels as if I was in my 20s again. Super friendly staff!!! Super Clean facilities, and absolutely love the IR sauna!!! They make ordering refills a breeze and the daily greens they have are amazing. Sadly google only goes up to 5 stars cause they are definitely a 10 out of 10 hands down!!!

reviews.name: places/ChIJvV-IXQEvXIgR4jsgqQ9qipM/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT214WE0wWnROV2hDY25CTmMxVllWa1pJVUdsVE1uYxAB
reviews.text: I came here twice earlier in the year and spent THOUSANDS on stem cell therapies as other reviewers stated they had on here; mine was for T2D and neuropathy issues.  After a promising consult where I was assured others who had done this had great results I decided to move forward. The first one yielded no results for  my T2D.  They quoted me to spend THOUSANDS more because I probably needed a second.  It also did not take.  I’m now $15,000 in debt with no results.  Doctor was friendly, just seems they over promise. I’ll spend years digging out of the financial hole I created for myself. My advice is don’t do it no matter how promising they make it sound!

reviews.name: places/ChIJvV-IXQEvXIgR4jsgqQ9qipM/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTURvakxTeTVBRRAB
reviews.text:
My daughter and I had a mother daughter spa day with Lynne just before Easter.  We both had filler there for the first time.  My daughter had her lips done.  I needed more of an overhaul ..under eyes,
nasiolabial folds and lips touched up.  Lynne listened and gave us both great results with very minimal bruising/downtime.  She is a great injector ..and has an artistic eye for balance and symmetry.  Overall ..a pleasant atmosphere, comfortable experience there.  Lynne is the best ..she will put you at ease and address your needs/wants perfectly!  We will both definitely be going back for future needs.  Many thanks Lynne.. we LOVE our results!

reviews.name: places/ChIJvV-IXQEvXIgR4jsgqQ9qipM/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTURnN3VYd3RBRRAB
reviews.text: I hardly ever write reviews but I feel this one is important. I spent a lot of money ($16,000) here on stem cell therapy under the assumption it would help me with my chronic pain and inflammation but it did not at all. Dr Lynne is very nice and compassionate ( I like her a lot as a person) but my auto immune did not improve at all. Even my blood work is the same (I purposely had it done before and 3 mo after).  I also had a knee injection and it didn’t do anything either. I’m back on conventional meds for the RA and had to go to the ortho for my knee and get a series of hyaluronic acid shots and a steroid injection just to walk. I followed all their recommendations to help the stem cells work for almost 4 months  (no meds) then I gave up and took them as I had zero improvement and needed my quality of life back.  I’m really disappointed as I was very hopeful but I want to let everyone know if they’re looking into this for an auto immune disease it’s not a one and done. You’ll need to get MANY infusions (around $6500 and up each) and then I still don’t know if they’ll help. I also got an infusion for my teenage daughter (also with auto immune)  and it might have helped her some as her kidney markers (blood work)  look a little better but she still has microscopic blood and protein in her urine (just not as much). So, in retrospect, I wish they had the knowledge to tell me (with RA) that it will take this many infusions and cost this much like a package deal with a guarantee that I’d get some benefit for the $. I was originally told the benefits of one infusion would last a year and that they’d redo it for free in a year if I didn’t have any results but when I told them about my lack of progress at month 4, they never offered a plan or said to come in and they’d redo it for free then vs a yr later or I would have before starting back on meds. Instead they gave me a price for another one which I was afraid to invest thousands more on hope! It’s all very disappointing and I feel like I wasted SO much money.

reviews.text:
I cannot be recommend the Ageless Health Clinic enough.  Jaime, Susan and Walker are awesome!
They take time to evaluate each client and customize a game plan that meets the individuals needs and goals.
My energy and overall health have improved since I started a few month's ago, definitely give them a shot!
Reid L.

reviews.name: places/ChIJ7QCiV2x_ZIgR_gUdUWxyn9s/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT25kalprSmtURVZ2Y1dob1YyRkJTMVJ2U1cxMFYzYxAB
reviews.text:
From the moment I began my testosterone therapy at Ageless Men, I couldn’t help but ask myself—why didn’t I do this years ago?

Susan is absolutely amazing! From our very first conversation, she made me feel completely at ease, taking the time to explain everything I needed to know in a way that was clear and reassuring. Her warmth and professionalism make me genuinely look forward to my weekly visits.

The entire team is just as outstanding—Jamie and Walker are phenomenal and go above and beyond to make every visit comfortable and welcoming. This office delivers first-class care, and the level of service is truly five-star.

If you’re looking for an exceptional healthcare experience, I cannot recommend Ageless Men enough!

reviews.name: places/ChIJ7QCiV2x_ZIgR_gUdUWxyn9s/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT21aMVRWSmxVRVZJVUhsMmFHSmlRalpvZVhKSlpVRRAB
reviews.text: It’s like Christmas!  A friend referred me to Ageless Men’s Health a little over a month ago.  I had no idea how much not having the right balance of testosterone could negatively impact my life.  I had low energy, sleepless nights, difficulty focusing, and was stressed and moody from work pretty frequently.  I am 45 with a decent T level but my body wasn’t using it adequately. Since having the T shot, along with a Vitamin D shot, all of this has changed. I sleep better, more focused, energetic, and my mood has improved significantly.  Now I look forward to visiting the clinic for my weekly pick me up and joke with friends about feeling like a child during Christmas while waiting for my next boost. Jamie and Susan are amazing. Thanks Team!

reviews.name: places/ChIJ7QCiV2x_ZIgR_gUdUWxyn9s/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2t4S1IzUkpOSGcxWW1OVVRXeHhWV28xWTFwRk1WRRAB
reviews.text: Ageless Men’s Health has been outstanding! Professional staff, convenient walk-in visits, and a welcoming environment that puts you at ease. Jamie explained everything clearly, and they closely monitor my health to ensure the best results. A true five-star experience! Highly recommend.

reviews.name: places/ChIJ7QCiV2x_ZIgR_gUdUWxyn9s/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2xFNFZFSk5jamhuZUdwQ1NUTnhNR3RwVm10Mk5HYxAB
reviews.text: Never felt like I was just a number until recently. Discontinued treatment due to  lack of trust and neglected to consult with me regards to blood work. Great med techs like Sam and new gentlemen that made my experiences great. I got the impression I overstayed my welcome at this location. "Appreciate you Darian"... Not true. 3 stars for Agless Mens as an organization.

reviews.text: Moves from another state and desired to move my protocol of peptides and such to here. Didn’t consultation, labs and follow up and all went great. reviews.text: I have been seeing Dr. Monaco since 2015. Over the years I referred many friends. What sets him apart is his thoughtful and patient-centered approach. He listens, considers the full picture, and treats the person, not just the lab results. This makes the difference in openness care!

reviews.name: places/ChIJY-uuM9xjZIgRZpemCGogju4/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VQQ292LS1PMjU2bVFBEAE
reviews.text: Dr. Monaco has done so much to help my whole family.  He has helped me with long term reproductive health issues and my husband with some very serious long term autoimmune issues.  I wish we would have found him sooner!  We are in our mid 50s and living our best life and health now.  Praise GOD!

reviews.name: places/ChIJY-uuM9xjZIgRZpemCGogju4/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURuNlBQU1VnEAE
reviews.text:
I've been under Dr. Monaco's care for many years now and am very happy with the service I have received and the suggested approaches he has recommended, including which supplements/prescriptions to use, based on lab results and discussions. Dr. Monaco was the only professional to suggest checking for heavy metals as a culprit for elevated liver enzymes, after all other remedies didn't have the desired result - he was right, and with his suggested chelation therapy my enzymes have now been in the normal range! I trust his advice, and I'm pleased with the results - thx Dr. Jack!

Longtime patient,
Joe W

reviews.name: places/ChIJY-uuM9xjZIgRZpemCGogju4/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNZNlBySEVBEAE
reviews.text: This was my first visit to Dr Monaco. The staff was very pleasant. I was seen in a timely manner. Dr Monaco was very informative and seemed to understand my issues. He also ordered a very extensive panel of labwork which I found impressive. He seemed to really want to help me get to the root cause of my health problems. I go back in a couple weeks for a follow up. I have already recommended him to a few friends and will continue to do so!!

reviews.name: places/ChIJY-uuM9xjZIgRZpemCGogju4/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN4ck1YWjVRRRAB
reviews.text: I love Dr. Monaco, Lisa, and the rest of the staff. Dr. Monaco takes time to listen and evaluate my health as an individual. He looks at me and what I need, not what the “average” 51 year old woman needs. It is rare today to have a physician do that. In my experience they spend less than 15 minutes with you and then they are rushing out the door while you try to ask a question. At Nashville Hormone I felt listened to and respected. Thank you! I feel great and I feel like I have my life back.

reviews.text: I’ve been coming to Relive Health Brentwood since Oct 2025 for my tirzepatide and testosterone shots. I honestly couldn’t recommend them more! The girls up front, Mikala and Briley, are so friendly and welcoming they always make you feel comfortable from the moment you walk in. Sarah, the nurse who gives me my shots every Thursday, is amazing super sweet, gentle, and incredibly informative. She answers all my questions and makes  sure I fully understand everything, which I really appreciate. Ashley, the NP I see every so often to go over my blood work and supplements. She is also super nice, sweet and informative. Landon is also incredible he’s the one I text all the time with questions about supplements, peptides, meals, and protein intake. He’s always prompt, knowledgeable, and genuinely cares about checking in to make sure I’m doing well. It’s clear this team is all about education, support, and making the experience as smooth as possible. Everyone here goes above and beyond, and I always leave feeling informed, supported, and taken care of. Highly recommend!

I would absolutely recommend Relive Brentwood to anyone looking for a reliable and high quality experience.

reviews.name: places/ChIJD1lLVqV4Y4gRP1X6dyPV2kQ/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT21wclVVNDNaMVZIV2w5c2NIcERMWE52VUVWNmVWRRAB
reviews.text:
I HIGHLY recommend Sanctuary Functional Medicine! Being a patient has truly changed my life for the better. From the moment I began my journey here, the level of care has been exceptional. This is not your typical clinic — they take the time to understand the full picture of your health and guide you with thoughtful, individualized care.

It is clear that the team genuinely cares about me as a person, not just a set of symptoms. They have shown real compassion and have been incredibly supportive every step of the way. Their expertise in functional medicine is evident — they’ve taught me more about my body, how it works, and how to build sustainable, healthy habits that actually make a difference in my life.

What I appreciate most is their whole-person and root-cause approach — they don’t just mask issues, they help uncover what’s truly driving them and work with you to restore balance. I always feel respected and genuinely cared for when I’m there. If you’re looking for a clinic that listens, educates, and partners with you in your health journey, Sanctuary Functional Medicine is the place to go!

reviews.name: places/ChIJD1lLVqV4Y4gRP1X6dyPV2kQ/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2xSVWMzYzBObXR4ZEZrNFpuUTRSbWRTYkRsc1pHYxAB
reviews.text: After working with 3 other doctors and multiple specialists for over 4 years to find solutions, I finally decided to try Sanctuary Functional Medicine. Functional medicine was something I had heard about, but this was my first experience which has blessed my life and my family's. From the first onboarding appointment into the intensive program, I felt truly heard for the first time. No detail was unimportant - they wanted to know my full history which helped to direct testing and then treatment based on the results. When you have been ill for so long and watch your life disintegrate when it seems you are trying to do everything right (clean eating and daily exercise) yet to no avail, it was a relief to have a partner that was walking alongside me. The regular medical community would not allow me to request extra specialized testing if there was something I brought to the table as a concern, but Sanctuary not only accommodated me, but we were also able to discuss things as if I was one of their colleagues and not one of their patients. While all of us wish that the road back to health could be quick and painless once we find the right medical partner, our bodies are composed of many complex systems and it takes time, patience, and yes, some tough days to reverse damage that has been done. I learned to trust the process and God to make it through the program along with putting in the work to follow the protocols and their guidance. The knowledge, support and encouragement of not only Dr. Potter but also Lauren helped me immensely. They both made me feel heard, safe, and that they could be trusted with my health. I haven't felt this good in decades! I will miss seeing them since they have really become good friends, but with the knowledge they have given me, I'm more in control of my health than ever before.

reviews.name: places/ChIJD1lLVqV4Y4gRP1X6dyPV2kQ/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT25NeVRFcHJXbWxDVDJGTU1EZFNWWHBLTjFJeWVuYxAB
reviews.text: I highly recommend Sanctuary Functional Medicine in Franklin, TN. Dr. Potter and his entire team are compassionate, knowledgeable, and take a true whole-person approach to healing. After years of chronic illnesses, I was seeking a faith-based, balanced path to better health and in just 3 months I’ve already seen meaningful improvements! Thanks to medical guidance, nutritional support, and natural supplements, I’ve begun reducing long-term prescription medications. I look forward to continuing my journey with this exceptional team and feel incredibly blessed for the opportunity!

reviews.name: places/ChIJD1lLVqV4Y4gRP1X6dyPV2kQ/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2xneGFHTmtOM1ExUkVaMWJYQXdMWG8zTUZvemJIYxAB
reviews.text: I’ve had an amazing experience! Doctor Potter and his WHOLE team are perfect and so understanding and supportive. They are extremely responsive. They are very dedicated and put in lots of time for each patient. They are so intentional in how they care for each patient. Doctor Potter and his team have given me my life back. I could not recommend them enough.

reviews.name: places/ChIJD1lLVqV4Y4gRP1X6dyPV2kQ/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT25SMlUzUXhUV2hZY3kxT1FsTnZOREJLYldSbU1WRRAB
reviews.text: Dr Potter and my nurse practitioner, Sunny Austin together, have been a lifesaver for me, after many years of mold sickness with no answers from regular doctors. When I first came to SFM I was at my wits end, with chronic illness nobody understood. Finally, to be able to get a diagnosis and be affirmed. I can’t tell you the difference it makes when someone takes you seriously, and you have a plan. Yes, it’s expensive, but worth it, because I can get in touch with them when I’m having trouble, and know they will get back to me. The other huge benefit from being a patient here is that Dr. Potter knows everything about mold testing your body, testing your home, remediation, all of it. In my case, insurance doesn’t pay for any of this, so they have to charge what they do to stay in business and help all of us people that fall through the cracks. Dr. Potter has bent over backwards explaining all the details (lots of details in getting rid of mold) and making sure my husband also is on board with things that have had to be done in my house to remediate. I felt all alone in my illness and now have knowledgeable professionals in my corner. I feel like I have the best experience and best care.

reviews.text: I had my first experience with the Low T Clinic in Gallatin this past Saturday, and I could not be more pleased! Ryan Curry and his staff are phenomenal. I have nothing but glowing things to say about this clinic location, and I highly recommend it to everyone!

reviews.text: Three weeks ago I was in the office witg existing patient...at checkout I tried to make appointment for myself since I'm post menopausal. I was told by Jenni I had to get online and request apt - not friendly...leave get online and request is name, number, email and DOB or states call or text. I called when no response and bloodwork was ordered and shows hormone imbalance...again, I call them and Jenni said now I need to get back online and fill out a form which I did...that was three weeks ago.  So unprofessional

reviews.name: places/ChIJ5XyXdqqbf4gRTdXR6ThEGJw/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNWcHNUZWFnEAE
reviews.text: My wife and I both love Dr Chauhan. The experiences we’ve each had there were wonderful. Dr. Chauhan has been a caring and compassionate female, who listened and helped us to achieve our personal goals. Even when I stopped using pellets, she took the time to send a letter to advise me on how to maintain and welcome me back should I decide to return. After 4 months, I had some complications that required an ob/gyn and I sent a text to ask for a phone conversation with Dr. Chauhan about a plan to either begin HRT again, and how to eventually wean off HRT without causing injury to myself. I sent a text on Sunday requesting a phone conversation, fully expecting a response on Monday. I received no response on Monday, and I called the office on Tuesday in case the number I texted was no longer active. I spoke to Jenni, who advised me that she did receive the text, and that Dr Chauhan was out Monday and out Tuesday morning, and wouldn’t be able to consider my request until Tuesday evening. On Wednesday, I received a text response from Jenni, advising that Dr Chauhan was unwilling to even speak to me so as to not step on another practitioner’s advice. When I advised Jenni that another practitioner had not advised me, and that I decided to resume the prescription that Dr Chauhan herself had prescribed, she was curt and told me that Dr Chauhan was booked through the end of the year and couldn’t promise to get a phone call to me. I am completely gobsmacked at the level of unprofessionalism by a) not even responding to a text or calling to let me know Dr Chauhan was out, and b) not even understanding what I wanted to discuss with the doctor before refusing. I find it hard to believe that Dr Chauhan is even aware, because the doctor that I saw for years would never have responded as such. Clearly, I’ll find another provider as this is a boutique cash business. I thought I had found a healthcare professional who actually cared about patients instead of just increasing numbers. I’m so disappointed.

reviews.text: Dr Chauhan, Dr Pearson, and all If their staff are compassionate, knowledgeable and a joy to work with. The therapy I have received in their care has improved the quality of my life in many ways. I am grateful for their excellent care for me over the years that I have been a patient.

reviews.text: I can’t say enough great things about Game Day! From the moment you walk in, Victoria greets you with such warmth and energy that you instantly feel like a champion. Stacie seamlessly picks up right where Victoria leaves off, making the process of getting your testosterone shots or peptides smooth and comfortable, all while keeping that same uplifting vibe. Christin, the physician assistant, is incredibly knowledgeable and takes the time to explain everything clearly when it comes to endocrinology, peptides, and testosterone. And of course, Cory, the owner, has built something really special here — a place where you feel supported, motivated, and treated with top-level care. Highly recommend Game Day to anyone looking for the best in their health and performance.

reviews.name: places/ChIJ-wKCWJZHZIgR5HKwQYR4yKQ/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2w4d05EWlhSMXBMV1c1NWVYRm5lVlozYXpaYVpuYxAB
reviews.text: I absolutely love this clinic. I’ve been to several due to moving multiple times over the last 3 years for work, and this is by far the friendliest and most professional so far. Corey has been great to work with and very thorough and attentive. Very reasonable with cost and always making sure I’m getting the better end of the deal. Stacey has the best attitude and gives the most painless injections and blood draws I’ve ever had. Victoria at the front desk is always so kind and upbeat. Always makes me glad to be there, and Christin the NP who checks labs and oversees the treatment plan has been the most intelligent and intuitive doc I’ve ever worked with! Truly know I’m in good hands here. Look no further. They all have your best interest in mind.

reviews.name: places/ChIJ-wKCWJZHZIgR5HKwQYR4yKQ/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT21oT1NqTTRPQzF3WDE4M1RtSk5ZbFIzWVhoUWVVRRAB
reviews.text: I was a little nervous going to a new clinic, but Stacie made me feel comfortable right away. She explained everything clearly and was so kind and knowledgeable. The clinic was spotless. I’ll definitely be coming back!

reviews.text: Adriane is amazing! She’s incredibly knowledgeable, welcoming, and truly cares about the people she works with. You can tell she believes in what Gameday stands for and goes above and beyond. The staff and atmosphere are great highly recommend!

reviews.name: places/ChIJEyOfDEpHZIgR4HrD306i250/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2xaZlRtbElWWEZsVnpkNFVHbHNiMFEyVTBjdFVFRRAB
reviews.text: I came to Optimus Men’s health Clinic as a referral from a family member. I had previously been seeing a different doctor regarding my testosterone levels and the results with that doctor were just all over the place. High one month, low the next month, no consistency at all. The doctor had no idea what was going on it was just overall a terrible experience. I felt worse than before I started taking Testosterone. I was so frustrated that I was about to stop entirely even though I know my testosterone was incredibly low. Thankfully I Decided to give this place a try. Absolutely incredible. I’ve only worked with Nick there but he has been incredibly helpful. Answers all my questions. Take this time when we are having an appointment and doesn’t make me feel rushed or like I’m wasting his time. I just can’t say enough good things about him and this clinic. So far my testosterone is Perfect and has been consistently the same for several months. I hope that trend continues but either way I truly believe this clinic is worth checking out if you are concerned with low T.

reviews.name: places/ChIJEyOfDEpHZIgR4HrD306i250/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTUNBbTZ6dGhnRRAB
reviews.text:
Best clinic around. Scott helped my life in many ways to get on track. I drive over an hour one way and it’s worth it 100 percent. The ladies up front are amazing as well.

Update: I cannot express enough in a review but if your needing help in men’s Health you’ve got to give this clinic a try. Six months ago I had a stent put in my heart at age 43. That life saving event was directly related to Scott Jarrell‘s advice telling me to go now and get checked out although they specialize in Men’s Health hormones, etc. you will get much more
..I’m forever. Grateful and
my family as well for this clinic.

reviews.text:
I just thought I couldn’t love the crew at Relive in Hendersonville more, but with every experience, there are new reasons why they are so special!! Today I met the owner, Josh, and he, too, was just as kind!
Rachel is my hero—so professional and knowledgeable, such a skilled injector, and manages to still make me feel special and cared about. She is a treasure!! I feel blessed to have found such a wonderful place to take care of all my aesthetic needs! ❤️

reviews.name: places/ChIJuzaAbaBHZIgR_mTCsw6EXDA/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2tKcmRrZHRlRTR6YzBSNFptVnBPV1J4VkhSbGRHYxAB
reviews.text: I absolutely love my experience at Relive in Hendersonville! I recently got Botox and lip filler with Rachel, and I couldn’t be happier with the results. Beyond how amazing my results look, what really stood out was Rachel’s kindness, professionalism, and warmth. She made me feel completely welcome, walked me through every step of the procedure, and answered all my questions. I felt prepared, calm, and cared for the entire time. It’s rare to find someone who combines such expert skill with a genuinely caring and reassuring presence, and Rachel absolutely does. I can’t recommend her enough!

reviews.name: places/ChIJuzaAbaBHZIgR_mTCsw6EXDA/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT21GTVFUQldSWGM0VUhwSFUzUkpabVF4Y1ZWdGEwRRAB
reviews.text:
I just returned from my first visit to Relive, where I had an hydrafacial with Brooke, and I could not be more pleased! I should preface this by saying that I moved here after having spent the past decade as a plastic surgery RN. Having been in the industry for years, I have had hundreds of Hydrafacials and thought I knew all there was to know about skincare.
I left there with more information than I have ever received by a skincare professional, and was blown away at the knowledge she has! It is without doubt a true passion of hers, and apparent that she truly cares that your skin and in helping you to achieve your goals.
What a sweet, beautiful woman with a big heart for her craft and her people! She is an amazing asset to the clinic!

reviews.text: Great people to work with on my health. Testosterone is a life saver for me. It effects everything. Most doctors are going to say your within the range even if your at 300 on your total and will not treat you. At 300 a man is just surviving. Thats no way to live. I love this place!!!

reviews.text: Dr. Troxell is an incredibly brilliant physician. She takes a great deal of time with her patients and will answer all of your questions, even if that means that she has to do additional research for you. Appointments often last an hour with her. She keeps up with cutting edge medical research and integrates new therapies in her practice. I feel extremely lucky to have found her.

reviews.name: places/ChIJS3zaQQEvXIgR2qI5-dXGLKY/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURRNHBlTGR3EAE
reviews.text:
Bio Identical Hormones are Dangerous!
You will trade improved physical condition (amazing), for emotional turmoil (devastating).  The hormones made my wife act and feel like a 20 year old, but drove her crazy to the point of divorce for no reason after 4 months on the stuff (we had been married 30 years).  A male friend took the treatment and eventually became so paranoid that he was committed until the stuff wore off/ran out.   This is not a miracle cure.  There is a price to pay.  Perhaps some will not experience these effects, but is it worth the risk?

reviews.name: places/ChIJyUeNwuIuXIgRRFp9UbTCV4Y/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTURJbFpfSmhnRRAB
reviews.text: If I could give this a zero I would. I went to this operation for 5-6 years when they were located off Kingston Pike. I went today to start back with testosterone therapy based on my levels from my annual physical. As soon as I walked in, the first person I ran into acted as if it was an inconvenience and informed me that I may not qualify. Without any knowledge of my medical records or anything. they have someone not in the medical field making that comment. I was also told if it had been 3 years, I would be considered a new patient. So I waited the 10-15 minutes I was asked to. Same person calls me back. I asked if it was within 3 years since the last time I received a treatment. Her response was 'sorta'. Either it is within 3 years or it isn't. Come to find out, it was within 3 years. The nurse practitioner then came in and said they need 2 blood draws on 2 separate days before 11am to see if I qualify. Several years ago, I received shots from the same operation and was over 600. Now I'm told if I'm over 349, I wouldn't qualify. So I agreed to do the draws. I asked if I could start with a draw Saturday. Apparently, in the 4 hours they are advertised to be open they were filled up. So we went with Monday. I was thinking 10am since that would give me time to let my employer and team know I would be out. They only offered 8 and 9. It wasn't just one thing. It was the complete unprofessionalism and defiance like I was doing them a favor. The people running this operation are not fit to run a lemonade stand. There are quite a few more options in Knoxville. I called and got an appointment tomorrow at 10am at one of their competitors that have way more and a better history of reviews. Avoid this Mickey Mouse operation like the plague

reviews.text:
I am beyond excited that Randy Martin is now seeing patients at Omni Functional Medicine as a health coach..(about time) He has been helping me with my health for years, and I truly don’t know where I’d be without his guidance.

Randy is incredibly knowledgeable, but what really sets him apart is his patience and genuine heart for what he does. He doesn’t rush you. He listens. He explains things thoroughly. And most importantly, he truly wants you to get better, not just manage symptoms, but actually heal.

It’s rare to find someone who combines clinical knowledge with compassion the way he does. Knoxville is so lucky to have access to him now. I genuinely hope others are able to find the same level of support and healing through him that I have.

Highly, highly recommend him!

She truly wants to get to the root of the problem. She spent so much time with me and really listened. I loved that she didn’t try to just prescribe something to put a bandaid on the issue. Randy, the health coach, is so knowledgeable. He also spent so much time with me and suggested what supplements I should be taking based on my bloodwork. I am so glad I found this office! I would recommend them to anyone!

reviews.name: places/ChIJ3Z5m6zwvXIgRUP2PPxPNOnk/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURwdFotS01REAE
reviews.text:
First of all, let me say this journey was not easy. It was not immediate. But, without Renew Vitality and Dr. Jacquemin, it would have been impossible. Before TRT and Renew Vitality's Testosterone Clinic, I was a sad, depressed person. I hated myself for weighing over 400 pounds. I was a lousy husband—an inadequate father. And I had no clue how I let it get out of control. Once I created this unhealthy spiral, I could not find my way out. I had tried everything to the point where I relegated myself to "I will always be fat" and "I am going to die early." I just assumed that would be my fate. You have to understand that I have tried everything outside of surgery. Every diet. Every drink. Most programs- all failed.

And then, I was introduced to Dr. Jacquemin. The trio of Dr. Jacquemin, Renew Vitality, and my personal Renew Vitality representative checking in on me weekly, at times- helped make the impossible possible; they helped save my life. Dr. Jacquemin has been one of the most hands-on doctors I've ever had. He goes beyond the normal "take this" and do this; he teaches patients and is an up-to-date subject matter expert in helping optimize your life, longevity, and TRT. He and Joe Walsh, the personal Renew Vitality representative, helped make this journey possible.

So, what is TRT doing for me? Well, the proof is in the pictures. I have been fat since my Army injury in 2006. I was fresh out of surgery and still eating as if I ran 5 miles a day. After being honorably discharged b/c the injury, I fell into a depression. That was not supposed to be the plan. The depression and weight gain continued for years. I was lost. I needed a change. I needed Renew Vitality.

After going through the process with Renew Vitality, my labs came back with what Dr. Jacquemin had suspected was wrong with me. Low testosterone. Now, I didn't take the first dose and just jumped up ready to go. Getting my body back to a place where I could exercise took time daily. I'm pretty sure my metabolism was nonexistent. I let myself get to over 400 pounds. TRT started to kick in after the first three months. I could tell that I was feeling better; I wasn't so sore; I started to love my life; I enjoyed sex again, but weight doesn't just come off. I slowly lost weight in my first year, and then something happened. I hit a switch. I realized I am on TRT, and this stuff is working- now it is time for me to do some work. I started listening to everything Dr. Jacquemin said, including diet, etc. (along with my medication for anxiety). I made a choice not to waste this treatment. Not to waste this opportunity. My positive mental change was made possible b/c of the things testosterone replacement was showing me was possible. So, I committed fully and will never look back.

Look- TRT, Dr. Jacquemin, Renew Vitality, and Joe Walsh helped get my body and mind to a place where life was worth living. Without them, I don't know how bad it would have gotten. Their ability to help me has unquestionably changed so many things for the positive. My wife and kids are happier now that Papi is happy. I go to every event and make the most out of it b/c there was a time when I was too embarrassed to show up. The positive ripples of the work done by these wonderful people will be felt for a lifetime and beyond. Thank you!

reviews.name: places/ChIJVUkmebRpD4gR3D6E090npW8/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTUNnbmR5Um1BRRAB
reviews.text: I did not have a great experience.  It started off well, a positive energy.  I spent thousands in initial testing, then I purchased the recommended supplements.  But, at the point I was told I needed these other treatments, which would cost thousands, I said I would need to think about it, the energy changed very negative, and to this date, I haven't ever received results from heavy metal testing that I paid for.  She just dropped me as did the staff.  Total cold shoulder when I decided not to play the game she wanted me to play.  Unless you want to give her thousands of dollars for some treatments she is pushing, don't go.  I have studied functional nutrition and there are alternatives that can improve health without what she is pushing in these high priced procedures.  She is in this to make money, not to help with your health.  Maybe one day I will receive my test results, but not holding any hope.  At least my experience has prompted me to resurrect my functional nutrition certification, where I hope I will be able to really help people.

reviews.name: places/ChIJVUkmebRpD4gR3D6E090npW8/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTUNRbVplUlNREAE
reviews.text:
I was totally at a loss as how to help myself feel better until I met Dr. Lela.  She is the first doctor who really listened and heard what I was saying.  I was dying on a cellular level, could barely walk and was tired all the time.  After following her protocol, my walking has greatly improved; I have more energy and no longer feel like I’m dying.  She has helped me loose  fifty plus pounds and I feel better than I have in years.  Dr. Lela has been a true blessing in my life and I would highly recommend her to anyone who is struggling with health issues and trying to live a more fruitful life.
Christine Weisman

reviews.name: places/ChIJVUkmebRpD4gR3D6E090npW8/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNaMk1mVFhREAE
reviews.text: Dr Lela has totally turned my health around! I went in search of something different after the doctor I was seeing told me that I was hopeless. I was gaining weight no matter what I tried, my joints and muscles ached, my hair was thinning, and I had no energy.  Dr. Lela took the time to really understand my history and did extensive blood work to look for the causes.  Every doctor I'd been to before wanted to only treat the symptoms or give ineffective advice ('loose weight", "exercise more", "etc.).  Dr Lela found the causes of my symptoms and we are working to eliminate them.  After the first 3 months I felt like a new person.  I'm 7 months in and have lost 40 lbs, my joints don't hurt, my body doesn't ache, and I have energy again! It wasn't easy at first, since I needed to totally overhaul my diet and eliminate several foods I was sensitive to, but after that, things got easy! I don't crave foods, and I no longer think about eating all of the time.  My health improved so much that my husband has also become a patient.  After 2 weeks his severe acid reflux has stopped and he feels better every day.  If you will follow what she tells you to do and take the supplements needed to restore your health, you'll feel better than ever! I 100% recommend Dr. Lela!

reviews.text: I don't normally leave reviews but these guys deserve it. One of the nicest teams of staff members I have ever been around. reviews.name: places/ChIJN7ttPuuFf4gRU_d0IfAofPo/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTURBNkpYQ01BEAE
reviews.text:
Very professional, courteous, capable and knowledgeable staff.
A bright and warm greeting from the receptionist, a little paperwork, and an offer to help myself to a drink (non-alcoholic) and snacks (which I accepted) and I was off, comfortably sitting in front of a big screen TV waiting to be called back for blood work. In a reasonable amount of time (about as much time as it takes to sip an 8oz. Sprite and scarf down a Slim Jim) I was called back to have my vitals checked and give a little blood. I have had blood drawn more times than I can remember over the years and this was, by far, the best experience I have had with that. I was very impressed and appreciated the nurse's skill. One and done. No fighting to try and find a vein. No bruising. I could hardly tell that I had even been stuck. ["That's what she said!"] (I know you were all thinking it! Lol)
After a little more waiting I was called back by Ricky to discuss my lab results. He was very disarming and easy to talk to. All of my questions and concerns were answered and addressed clearly and candidly. I learned a lot and look forward to exploring more of their services. I highly recommend that any man who feels like they are slowing down in anyway (mentality, physically, sexually) go check this place out. This place is kinda awesome.

reviews.name: places/ChIJN7ttPuuFf4gRU_d0IfAofPo/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT20xeGFVeDFhM1owVldwVldsOXZVM1JUUVRNNFVGRRAB
reviews.text:
Will come back for another review after 6 weeks but here goes on the lead up and post first visit....
They text you to death...... lol no pressure. Finally responded being I was busy and needing to do some research. Office staff is on point, got to get better with their blood draw wink wink. Though I just started, being able to sit down and talk to Rich (manager) was awesome. Very knowledgeable with a strong medical background and though he may not know the answer, he has no problem in researching. Makes understanding the TRT process easy from actual experience as a client himself. Pricing seems fair especially if I cut out the eating out and useless other things I waste my money on in a brain fog. If I am not getting injected with Placebo's and this is not some Government black op program to inoculate people with experimental zombie drugs, I look forward to seeing what impact on my Testosterone levels will be in 6 weeks. Will share initial and post 6 week numbers when completed.

reviews.name: places/ChIJN7ttPuuFf4gRU_d0IfAofPo/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2xsblZFTnhTVFp3UkVndGFGQlZSVE56ZWtrMVNVRRAB
reviews.text: Man this place is awesome. I went in for testosterone therapy and ended up learning a ton more about peptides and weight loss options. I’m a bigger guy so I have always felt a bit uncomfortable talking to people about my body, but the staff at Gameday Men’s Health made me feel secure about the whole process. The free one-hour consultation was professional and relaxing. They really made me feel comfortable about what we would be doing by the confidence they had. I’ll be back to update on results but I already know I made a good choice.

reviews.name: places/ChIJN7ttPuuFf4gRU_d0IfAofPo/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT25veVoyeDJRVmRPYTNGcGRYVnJaRGxMVm5SV09FRRAB
reviews.text: To be honest I didn’t expect to be this impressed but GDMH does it right. They didn’t rush me at all when they could have. They explained things clearly to me when they could have been vague. They treated me  like a person when I could have been just another sell. I know it sounds dramatic but this was not just another appointment. The free consultation was so helpful. As someone who’s from a family of firefighters the lifetime 20% discount means a lot. It shows they genuinely appreciate those who serve and I value that a lot.

reviews.name: places/ChIJrbio6-J_1YcRV5vV5dXJzLk/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2pOTFVqaHZaamxRTkRGaWVHTmtVVkkzTUVkc1lWRRAB
reviews.text:
Even my husband is a believer!

It’s been hard to find a primary care doctor who really knows their stuff, cares about us personally, and is dedicated to getting to the root of our health problems. But from the moment we walked in her office, we noticed something different. The waiting room was calm—no TVs or ads—and it felt welcoming, even kid-friendly with a Montessori vibe.

She took her time listening to us and explained everything clearly whenever we had questions, and we had a lot of questions! What really stood out was how she picked up on my husband’s reluctance and made him feel comfortable—he was even laughing out loud! That’s huge because it’s the first time he’s been interested in taking those tough but necessary steps for his health.

Since then, communicating with her has been easy and quick. We definitely recommend this place to everyone.

reviews.text: GO TO AGELESS MALE ON GERMANTOWN PKWY. They pretty much do the same thing but for half the price. I went in there and after giving me my total the lady attempts to try to sign me up for Affirm like she was about to really do it and make it seem like it's part of the situation.  I was told my testosterone was extremely low so I went to my Pc the next day worried but was told it was 100 points higher. So they used a combination or fear and men wanting to perform to get you locked in but I'm at Ageless male and they are great and charge alot less and don't try to sign you up for affirm. At least they haven't yet lol. This is just my experience about what actually happened when I went.

reviews.name: places/ChIJJ_Sgh2SEf4gRTiwC5NWPEFs/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT20xUGVYWlNlako2Y1dJemVFMW5SR1Y0TlhadmQyYxAB
reviews.text: I have my first appointment with them today and I've felt nothing but cared for and seen. Every member of the staff has been kind, and I'm looking forward to bettering my overall health because of how straightforward, knowledgeable, and compassionate the staff and Doctor(s) are.

reviews.name: places/ChIJJ_Sgh2SEf4gRTiwC5NWPEFs/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT21kdk5sWm9kalp3T0RGb01FdHpVVEZVTVMxMk5XYxAB
reviews.text: This place is a complete scam. My husband went to get his testosterone levels checked and they said they were very low. Tried to sell him on things he didn’t need. My husband decide to check with his PCP before going with these people. This business charged him well of $3,000 for medicine we have never received. Has made us jump through hoops to get this resolved. Including getting notes from our PCP. We have done all the things and now they will not even answer his phone calls. We will have to get a lawyer involved. I highly recommend doing your research before going to a place like this.

reviews.name: places/ChIJJ_Sgh2SEf4gRTiwC5NWPEFs/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT25Cd1IwVnRNREozWTFKNlh6bGFTbWxhVEc0emFGRRAB
reviews.text:
I have already informed your company three separate times that you have the wrong number for the patient you are trying to reach. There is no reason I should still be receiving calls and messages about this individual.

What is especially disturbing is that one of your voicemails disclosed this person’s lab results—even after I clearly instructed you to remove my number. This is a serious breach of privacy and completely unacceptable.

Let this serve as notice: if I receive one more call from your company regarding this matter, it will escalate into a much bigger issue. Be advised.

reviews.name: places/ChIJkY58Zs_3Y4gRUjyB8lZ8eqA/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2tGWGRXMDNZamszYm5CcE9UaEdaRUZDUmpCbWJIYxAB
reviews.text: First, I want to say that the esthetics were so beautiful. The welcome was warm and personable. The staff was very compassionate, they listened and wanted to get to know who you were as a person. I did not feel rushed and I did not feel ashamed for being over weight in their clinic. Secondly I think that everyone should have a PCP and a separate weight management provider. After my visit, I think I will prioritize this form of specialty care moving forward. It’s a very different experience seeing a provider that is solely focused on managing your weight. I loved my first experience and look forward to continuing services at Genesis to help me reach and manage my weight loss goals.

reviews.name: places/ChIJVfQ4CicIZIgRVtkduDGL9Ds/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2paZlVGWm5hak5tVDJKRFkzcGFiREp2VGkxTmJGRRAB
reviews.text:
The experience my partner just had here is unacceptable. I'm not just an angry reviewer, I'm a person who cares deeply for their partner and for other people trying to get the care they need. He got his blood drawn not even a week ago with his PCP, no problem – he is in his 20's and his T is under 200. He arrived here for a scheduled appointment at opening hour for another blood draw that they needed for some reason, they wouldn't accept his PCP's. He waited an hour and 30 minutes until he went to find someone to tell them that he had to leave soon. They were suddenly able to treat him right then. The lady who did his draw didn't even take blood, just poked him a bunch painfully and said something about his veins being no good and to come back next week.

The experience was miserable, and he didn't even get what he went for. We will not be coming back :)

reviews.name: places/ChIJVfQ4CicIZIgRVtkduDGL9Ds/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2xsUGJHNTNORXN6VDI5blEyRlVhRTlHZGxCak9YYxAB

reviews.name: places/ChIJcfkdNAX5Y4gRuZu4Cw2hcIU/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT213dE9VRTJkMGhRTlVNeWJsRnNkRGswYldzelgwRRAB
reviews.text:
I have been seeing Stevie as a patient for chronic Lyme and Endometriosis for 6 months now. I came to her after having tried several different types of treatment for my chronic inflammation. I was apprehensive to start something new after so many failed attempts where I only found short term relief. I have had chronic Lyme for over 7 years now. I can say confidently and gratefully that this clinic is different, they care for the whole person, and the quality of care is unmatched! The improvements I have seen just after 6 months of treatment have been huge strides toward continued pain relief.

Stevie was recommended by my Lyme doctor, and I am very thankful for her bedside manner & wisdom. I have never been able to find a doctor that understands how to treat both Endometriosis and Lyme together. Stevie's knowledge in both my illness is again unmatched! She has a confident demeanor and I appreciate that she doesn't overpromise and under-deliver.

The nurses and entire staff is amazing here! They are so smart and intuitive. I have been impressed by their knowledge on all of the treatments. Thank you VitalRenew for all that you have done for me and how you have paved the way for chronic illness patients to be heard, healed, educated, and empowered.

reviews.name: places/ChIJcfkdNAX5Y4gRuZu4Cw2hcIU/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT210dE5HdDFXVmxuU0dSNFYydzRWVlJ2WDBOMk5IYxAB
reviews.text: Stevie and her team were very welcoming and nice. I was able to set up an appointment very easily. I’ll definitely be coming back to her clinic. The space was very welcoming and clean. They really connect with you and are invested in helping you with your health. I’ll recommend this clinic to my friends and family as well.

reviews.name: places/ChIJcfkdNAX5Y4gRuZu4Cw2hcIU/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURPMDVxa1h3EAE
reviews.text: Great location. Staff is always friendly and willing to help.  They are great at getting labs back fast and addressing all your concerns. I was able to get certain vitamin deficiencies inline ASAP and think their hydration and vitamin boosts are pretty awesome. If you're feeling kind of tired or would just like some quick overall hydration or boost, this is a great spot.

reviews.name: places/ChIJcfkdNAX5Y4gRuZu4Cw2hcIU/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTURJaWRUcFpnEAE
reviews.text:
I don't have the words to describe how appreciative I am for the wonderful staff at Biorenew and all they have done for me! Since my first appointment two years ago, I have truly felt heard and cared for in a way that I have not experienced anywhere else. The dedicated nurse practitioners and clinical staff take the time to really get to know you as a person. These ladies are brilliant, trustworthy, and kind. They stop at nothing to find the underlying cause of your symptoms and treat them accordingly. Kelsey and Stevie have done wonders in treating my auto inflammatory disease, and I could not be more grateful for them! While other doctors told me my symptoms were simply caused by stress, the ladies at Biorenew took their time to find the underlying cause of my symptoms. Amber is a ray of sunshine and brings a smile to my face every time I walk in the door. Robin and Courtney are amazing as well! They always return my calls and send my perscriptions in a timely manner. I have had nothing but great experiences here, and I will continue to recommend Biorenew to all of my friends and family!

- Victoria

reviews.text: Kelsey is wonderful! I’m sleeping better and I have more energy now. I can’t thank her enough. The staff is fantastic also. I highly recommend them.
