reviews.text: Dr. Howard and his crew are highly knowledgeable and respectful! I have been dealing with quadriceps tendinosis for months when I decided to contact them to see if they could help me since the health center my health insurance covers didn’t help me in anyway! Dr. Howard recommended umbilical blood plasma injection, 2 rounds and 6 weeks apart. After the second round I started to really feel strong improvements and actually was able to start strengthening tendons and muscles with out much pain. It’s only getting better, I’m now able to do what I love again, running after my kids, Mountain Biking and playing drums! I highly recommend them.

reviews.name: places/ChIJAQBcvLJ_ZIgRM3-v6Kyh8ls/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURfZ3MtZFdBEAE
reviews.text: The team at compass is incredible. They pay attention to all details from the start. Olivia is always very communicative about orders and scheduling and Mary is the best nurse I’ve ever had. She’s never, not once missed an IV needle and is always informing me on what is going on with my treatments and what other treatments might be beneficial. Most importantly, I trust everyone here is genuinely looking out for your health.

reviews.name: places/ChIJAQBcvLJ_ZIgRM3-v6Kyh8ls/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VKSEJucFdKc3RTWE13EAE
reviews.text: Dr. Howard’s office is incredible. The staff at Compass doesn’t just help you with your issue, they teach you how to live a healthier lifestyle to prevent other issues from occurring! Very satisfied with Compass and all they have helped me with.

reviews.name: places/ChIJAQBcvLJ_ZIgRM3-v6Kyh8ls/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURQb2QtWkJnEAE
reviews.text:
Very disappointed at the integrity of fees for services. No treatment plan and cost was shared with me prior to automatically enrolling me in a monthly membership. No one told me the costs until i was at the cash register with other patients and staff ringing up more than i was told it would be. No one mentioned it would be for a year.  But when i said no way they said i already agreed to their cancellation policy.  How can make i formed decisions when no one presents me with options and explains how $200 per mont for 12 months will help me? I had already paid $1200 for 1 blood draw and 1 consultation with the doctor.  Yet it was expected I pay  just to cancel something I never agreed to.

I did not insist the doctor do what I wanted, or  tell him how to help me, but I was told to pay or I would owe additional 3-6 mos membership just to cancel.  If I don't want your services I should NOT be bound to pay for it ever.  It’s called a choice. How can a concierge doctor not respect patients  enough to lay out a treatment plan and get an agreement to work together? You should rethink this high pressure tactic and discuss with patients the reality of what your fees are and what services merit these fees!

I did not request that you give me a prescription for 4 mos, you chose to do that and then stated you are legally bound to be my doctor for min of 4 months because of the prescriptions written. Nope not a thing and all or a vitamin and $20 a month script?. Shame on you!

reviews.text: I was referred to Gameday by my personal trainer out of concerns my T was low. He introduced me to Chad via text, and I took it from there. Chad was quick with his response and made getting me set up to come in for bloodwork, etc easy and quick. From the time I arrived until I left, his team didn’t miss a beat. So impressed, Chad was on site to introduce himself and we had great conversation about what I had going on. I knew this was the best thing I could do for myself and his team made it all comfortable and like I had been coming in for months. If you are looking for solutions, give him a call. He will absolutely take incredible care. You can tell he has pride in what he is doing for the community and how he runs his business.

reviews.name: places/ChIJn7QNRzFlZIgRoewLiUjppqk/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2kxMU5rVm1NMWhDWkdkSU0xazRhbEJPTWtJdFluYxAB
reviews.text:
I’ve been doing TRT with Gameday Men’s Health in Green Hills for the past 3 months, and the experience has been outstanding. From day one, the team was incredibly knowledgeable and took the time to clearly explain the entire process. My testosterone levels were very low, and I was struggling with brain fog and low energy.

Since starting TRT, I feel like a new person — my mental clarity has improved significantly, my confidence is up, and I’m seeing real results in the gym. I can’t thank the team enough for their support and professionalism. Highly recommend Gameday to any guy looking to take control of his health!

You can really tell they take pride in what they do.

I absolutely love this clinic! It has truly helped me take control of my weight and overall health. Since starting, I’ve seen drastic improvements in my asthma, my sleep, and my overall energy levels. I genuinely feel healthier than I have in a long time.

I really appreciate the monthly check-ins where they monitor things like muscle levels and give me helpful information to track my progress. It makes the whole process feel thoughtful and personalized rather than just a quick visit.

Also, a big shoutout to the staff—they are always so friendly, welcoming, and helpful. Joy is amazing! Every visit has been a great experience, and I’m really grateful for the support I’ve received here.

reviews.text: This place is absolutely amazing , can’t say enough good things about Dr. Conway. From the moment I walked into the office, I felt welcomed and cared for. I highly recommend Dr. Conway to anyone looking for a doctor who combines expertise with compassion. Thank you, Dr. Conway, for your outstanding care !  The nurses in the office! The entire experience at Dr. Conway’s office was exceptional—not just because of Dr. Conway himself, but also because of his amazing nursing staff. The nurses are warm, friendly, and incredibly attentive. They made me feel comfortable and cared for every step of the way. Whether it was taking the time to answer questions, being gentle during procedures, or just offering a reassuring smile, their professionalism and kindness really stood out. It’s clear that the whole team works together to provide top-notch care. You guys are truely the best in my book! Keep up the good work ! And you will definitely see me again!

This review was 3 years ago and I am still with them and they are still the best recovery clinic. They know your names and your story and don't have to look in a file for it. They are the best, the office ladies are the best of the best as well. Idk where I might be today without them!!

reviews.text: I love seeing Dr. Forbes! I was diagnosed hypo/hashi at 18 and went through several doctors that just brushed me off. I took the meds but nobody took the time to help me feel better. Then I found Dr.Forbes and I have finally felt like myself. He’s patient, kind, understanding and he is very thorough with explaining everything to you! He is encouraging and supportive! I always recommend him! Love the office staff too!

reviews.name: places/ChIJR6zRs8dlZIgRtKDTqhOetMc/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNnaXYzYzRnRRAB
reviews.text: I was referred to Dr Forbes by my pain management specialist (who I've traveled to Cincinnati to see for nearly 20 years, and he is well worth it!). The two met at medical conferences and are good friends.  I was having trouble finding a good local physician.  How ironic that I found my local PCP+ (definitely PCP PLUS) through my out-of-state specialist! I can't say enough good things about Dr Forbes and his staff. He once sat and listened to me cry -- pouring my guts out -- while handing me tissues.  He never once rushed me or pushed me out of the office. THAT is unheard of, but that's how he is. His entire staff is kind and understanding, and very gentle in dealing with sensitive patients like me. He listens to me, understanding that I know my own body.  He doesn't force me on or off medication when I have grave concerns about it. I firmly believe in the holistic, integrated approach. It makes complete sense! And I recommend Dr Forbes and Nashville Integrated Medicine. Heartily.

reviews.text: I had an amazing experience at Optimize U East Nashville! Staff was very welcoming, knowledgeable, and genuinely caring, and you can truly tell they want to help you feel your best. They take the time to explain each service without making you feel rushed, which I really appreciated. The pricing is very affordable in my opinion, especially for the quality of care and wide range of wellness services they offer, including cryotherapy, infrared sauna, red light therapy, and cold plunge. Everything is clean, professional, and thoughtfully designed, and I highly recommend it to anyone looking for a wellness center where the staff truly cares about your health and recovery.

reviews.name: places/ChIJXcymTlxnZIgRfcid2dFX2M4/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT21NMVdFaEdZeko2YjFVeFNUaElORUZIVm1kNk1tYxAB
reviews.text: Optimize U is awesome! The whole team is super friendly and makes you feel comfortable right away. They explain everything clearly and actually take the time to answer your questions, which I really appreciated. The place is clean and welcoming, and you can tell they truly care about helping people feel their best. I’d definitely recommend them to anyone looking to take charge of their health!

reviews.name: places/ChIJXcymTlxnZIgRfcid2dFX2M4/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT25WVlVsSlRXVWh5YTA5S1VHOHlhVTlZVG5ST2FuYxAB
reviews.text: Optimize U is like a wellness playground for grown-ups. One day I’m in the red light bed feeling like I’m charging my superpowers, the next I’m sweating out all my bad decisions in the sauna, and then getting instant revival from an IV drip. The staff? Absolute gems. The place? Spotless and relaxing. The results? Better skin, better mood, faster recovery… basically a better me. 10/10, highly recommend!

reviews.text:
I can’t say enough great things about Relive Health Nashville! Their weight loss program has been absolutely amazing. The products are high-quality, effective, and truly make a difference. I’ve felt more energized, more confident, and I’m finally seeing real, sustainable results.
What really sets them apart, though, is the team. From the moment you walk in, you’re treated with kindness, encouragement, and professionalism. They take the time to listen, answer questions, and create a plan that feels personalized — not one-size-fits-all. You can tell they genuinely care about your success and your overall health.
If you’re looking for a supportive environment and weight loss solutions that actually work, I highly recommend Relive Health Nashville!

reviews.name: places/ChIJq1GxTgthZIgRnynu5-TXMo8/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2xBeWFsODFVbHB2TjJOd1QzcE1PRUpOWDFkeVVVRRAB
reviews.text: Such an amazing experience with Relive Nashville! Stephanie and her team truly know their stuff. They listened to my full health history and created a treatment plan that helped me hit my goal weight without losing muscle. Feeling better than ever, thank you! I’ll absolutely be back!

reviews.name: places/ChIJq1GxTgthZIgRnynu5-TXMo8/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT21aVlVsODVSM0JQVmtzemNsSmpRVXcwWnpWaGFFRRAB
reviews.text:
I can’t say enough great things about Halie Souza and Relive Health Nations! They are the reason I’ve lost 14 pounds in less than 4 weeks—and more importantly, I feel better, healthier, and more energized than I have in years.

Halie has been absolutely amazing. She took the time to coach me on exactly what to eat and what exercises to focus on, all customized to my goals and lifestyle. Her support and encouragement made all the difference, and the team at Relive Health Nations truly makes you feel cared for every step of the way.

If you’re looking for a program that actually works and a nurse who genuinely cares about your success, I can’t recommend Halie and Relive Health Nations enough!

reviews.text: Staff is very nice and professional. However, they come off as if what is important is to sell a product, and a very expensive one at that. $3000 for a year treatment?  Not covered by insurance?  While you hear a lot about the success in radio comercials, they are not upfront in that you are signing a contract. If you can afford it, great, but for the average Joe it is too expensive.  Dont be forced into signing anything or and do your research first.

reviews.text: Everyone has been accommodating and easy to talk to about issues that men don’t like to discuss.  They have been open and honest and worked with me to find the program that best suits my needs, nothing more. The program I am on has been extremely effective!

reviews.text: These people really care! I've been dealing with Brian for many years, and He always pays attention to me and makes me comfortable talking about the most uncomfortable things. My life is now on track in more ways than one, and I have The staff at the Tennessee Men's Clinic to thank

reviews.name: places/ChIJydVK9bdmZIgRmGRFBcwabeI/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT213eGJGcFRaM1YzYUV4Q1dYWkljbmhQU0hOSVprRRAB
reviews.text:
Greetings,
This is a business first before being a healthcare entity.  Profits first before patient ssatisfaction.  Beware of medical providers who seek to turn patient's bodies into profit centers.
They do have a contract which they attempt to sell. On my visit a doctor was noted but up on arriving we only saw a PA.  They are excellent at monetizing patients.  Take the contract with you and review it.  They are built with a lawyers insight to maximize profits and not patient health?  This is from a thirty-year healthcare professional.
Go to a urologist instead if needed.

reviews.name: places/ChIJydVK9bdmZIgRmGRFBcwabeI/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2w5V2JXOXBOV2xoTVdoVGREQkpTRkZzVEhGTFlYYxAB
reviews.text: I came into the clinic about 6 weeks ago. Looking check my testosterone. The staff there are friendly and professional. From the young man at the front desk to the doctor. My testosterone went from the low 300s to the mid 900s in six weeks all while keeping my fertility that regular testosterone can harm. The worst part of this experience is the price however, all I can say is you get what you pay for and I plan on staying around for a while.
